creator: netchild@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Bryan Drewery from comment #6)

I understand your interest in this patch, it surely is an easy way forward (depending on how much places have this, is surely is even the least work intensive).

On the other hand I'm not sure if it is a good idea to have something like your patch in the base system.

The number of ports violating the naming scheme is small compared to the total number of rc scripts in the ports collection.
